landing.heroDesc: AI-powered personalized programs, real-time behavioral tracking, shelter management — all in one platform.
landing.discoverDesc: From shelter to family — a platform for every step of the canine journey.
landing.featuresDesc: A complete platform for owners, dog trainers and shelters.
landing.feat1Desc: 28 days of training adapted to your dog's unique profile using artificial intelligence.
landing.feat2Desc: Daily journal, evaluation, real-time statistics to measure every progress.
landing.feat3Desc: Animals, staff, spaces, adoptions — a complete platform for shelters.
landing.feat4Desc: Clients, courses, calendar, payments — everything for professional dog trainers.
landing.feat5Desc: Automatic session planning, reminders and appointments so you never miss a thing.
landing.feat6Desc: Safety alerts, contraindications, protocols adapted for reactive dogs.
landing.testimonial1Text: My staffie progressed in 2 weeks what used to take 2 months. The AI plan changed everything!
landing.testimonial2Text: DogWork lets me manage my 30 clients effortlessly. The pro space is incredible.
landing.testimonial3Text: Managing our 80 animals has become seamless. Behavioral evaluations are a real plus.
landing.trainingDesc: Our AI analyzes your dog's complete profile — breed, age, behavior, identified issues — to create a custom 28-day training plan.
landing.familyDesc: Whether you're an individual, a professional trainer or a shelter manager, DogWork adapts to your reality and that of your companions.
landing.pricingDesc: No credit card required. Upgrade whenever you want.
landing.ctaDesc: Join DogWork and start your personalized program today.

auth.title: DogWork
auth.subtitle: Intelligent dog training
auth.ownerDesc: Manage my dogs and track their training plan
auth.educatorDesc: Follow my clients and evaluate shelter animals
auth.shelterDesc: Manage animals, staff and shelter spaces
auth.adminDesc: Oversee the platform and manage content
auth.employeeDesc: Shelter employees: use your email + 6-digit PIN code
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.name: Name
auth.pinHelp: The PIN is sent/reset by the shelter administrator.
auth.pinError: The employee PIN code must contain exactly 6 digits.
auth.employeeError: Invalid employee credentials. Check email + PIN or request a reset from the shelter.
auth.signupSuccessDesc: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.emailSentDesc: Check your inbox to reset your password.

dashboard.welcomeDesc: Add your dog to start a tailored training program.
dashboard.profileReady: Profile ready — Let's create a tailored program
dashboard.noSessionsDesc: Start your first day to see your data here.
